title: Lost
description: A small Texture pack arg included!
body:
This texture pack can just be for looks but there is a arg inside for the Mystery-solvers! there are New textures for the villagers, the iron golem, the sun and moon, an a few paintings! also here is how to get to the end of the arg:[Don't Look Up!](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1jb-M4VKnv4O1FcMZVTtYlTq7Za4yToKxaHLWrn7-Czg/edit)
INSTALL BY UNZIPPING THEN TAKING THE ONE FILE INSIDE OUT!
